sections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.description: Common questions about using Spellvault as your MTG Card Scanner App.

items.title: What is an MTG card scanner app?
items.description: An MTG card scanner app uses your phone camera to identify Magic: The Gathering cards and turn them into collection records much faster than manual entry.

items.title: How does Spellvault scan MTG cards?
items.description: Spellvault uses your iPhone camera to read the card and match it against Magic card data, so you can capture card details in seconds.

items.title: Can Spellvault identify the card set and edition?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault is built to recognize more than the card name, which helps you log the right version and keep your collection cleaner.

items.title: Can I scan a full box of MTG cards in one session?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault is designed for bulk scanning sessions, so you can move through boxes, binders, and collection lots without turning intake into slow manual work.

items.title: Does Spellvault show MTG card prices after scanning?
items.description: Yes. Once a card is in your collection, you can review price information inside the same workflow instead of switching to a separate tool.

items.title: Can I organize scanned cards into binders, folders, or decks?
items.description: Yes. Scanning is only the first step. After that, you can place cards into the structure you already use to manage your collection.

items.title: Is Spellvault an iPhone MTG card scanner app?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault is built for iPhone, which makes it a practical option if you want fast scanning from the phone you already use during collection work.

items.title: Why use Spellvault instead of entering MTG cards by hand?
items.description: Manual entry takes longer, creates more friction, and usually leads to more cleanup. Spellvault speeds up intake and keeps scanning, organization, and pricing connected.
